name: mismatched year params with rate type and year splits
description: Verifies that rate type CTE WHERE clause includes the full query-level year range when year splits are active, even when the rate type column has a narrower year range than another column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "tffa4ec673b4f60169d1851d9d0099ceb" as (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "player_gamelogs"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."pid"), "te335326c9d2aa8c6ac0e66367251c7a2" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)), "t1c3fcb1f32313815df18da7f8e31c3cd" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "te335326c9d2aa8c6ac0e66367251c7a2"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", CAST(t1c3fcb1f32313815df18da7f8e31c3cd.rec_yds_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(tffa4ec673b4f60169d1851d9d0099ceb.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "rec_yds_from_plays_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tffa4ec673b4f60169d1851d9d0099ceb" on "tffa4ec673b4f60169d1851d9d0099ceb"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tffa4ec673b4f60169d1851d9d0099ceb"."year" = 2023 left join "te335326c9d2aa8c6ac0e66367251c7a2" on "te335326c9d2aa8c6ac0e66367251c7a2"."pid" = "player"."pid" and te335326c9d2aa8c6ac0e66367251c7a2.year = player_years.year and te335326c9d2aa8c6ac0e66367251c7a2.year IN (2021,2022,2023) left join "t1c3fcb1f32313815df18da7f8e31c3cd" on "t1c3fcb1f32313815df18da7f8e31c3cd"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t1c3fcb1f32313815df18da7f8e31c3cd"."year" = 2023 where player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "te335326c9d2aa8c6ac0e66367251c7a2"."rec_yds_from_plays", "t1c3fcb1f32313815df18da7f8e31c3cd"."rec_yds_from_plays", tffa4ec673b4f60169d1851d9d0099ceb.rate_type_total_count, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
